历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 29403 → 28568 → 49919 → 51876 → 53452. Since 2023, the ranking has shifted significantly backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 24884 positions over the past three years, showing a clear backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 53452. The Physics Category enrollment plan in Hebei Province was 89 in 2021, 81 in 2022, 83 in 2023, 85 in 2024, and 86 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 84, a decrease of 2 compared to 2025, indicating a slight reduction in enrollment and slightly intensified competition.
3. [School Level] 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has continuously risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, showing a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to controversy arising from a recruitment announcement. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 76th, rated as average, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. There is no history of admission gaps. Plant Protection is an A- discipline, the only discipline at A- or above at this university, consistent with its agricultural and forestry characteristics, and has a certain appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. The total number of examinees in Hebei Province in 2026 is approximately 609,800, with an estimated Physics Category count of about 365,880 based on recent proportions, a slight increase compared to 2025. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has been continuously rising from 2021 to 2025 (412 → 430 → 439 → 448 → 459), indicating a tightening competitive environment. Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, far from Hebei, so regional preference has a neutral to slightly weak impact on Hebei candidates' willingness to apply. The university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0%, which is a normal scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in rankings in recent years, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the increase in Hebei candidates, and the rise in the provincial control line, the ranking is expected to shift slightly forward based on the 2025 baseline of 53452. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 52506, with a range of 52006–53006.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)

- Artificial Intelligence
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation
- New Energy Science and Engineering

- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering (including Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering)
- Architecture/Urban and Rural Planning
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Environmental Engineering
- Japanese/Philosophy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 52006–53006, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electrical Engineering have historical admission rankings far below the university line (approximately 16000–21000), requiring a ranking significantly better than the predicted range for a chance. Tier 2 majors (Automation, New Energy, Mathematics, etc.) have rankings around 20000–30000, which are far from the predicted range, and actual admission rankings may be higher than the university line, so it is advisable to position yourself reasonably based on your own ranking. Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials, Environment, etc.) have rankings close to the university line, making them suitable for safety.
